subcodes.first_line: O servant of the beloved of God! Though for a time thou didst occupy thyself with service to the friends and didst raise the standard of servitude unto the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم احبای الهی هر چند مدتی بود که بخدمت یاران پرداختی و در عبودیت حق علم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
